summary: A clip from a Fox News segment with a FOX NEWS ALERT banner and a WASHINGTON, Saturday label. It shows phone-style footage from inside a banquet hall where tactical officers in helmets and vests stand on a stage among formally dressed attendees. A phone-call panel on the right shows a photo labeled as the President of the United States. The lower-third reads PRESIDENT TRUMP ON CORRESPONDENTS' DINNER SHOOTING and later TRUMP: TOUGH TO SECURE CORRESPONDENTS' DINNER SITE.

script.scene: Tactical officers in helmets and vests stand on a stage among formally dressed attendees; lower-third reads PRESIDENT TRUMP ON CORRESPONDENTS' DINNER SHOOTING.
Footage pans across the banquet hall; lower-third reads TRUMP: TOUGH TO SECURE CORRESPONDENTS' DINNER SITE.
A phone-call panel shows a photo labeled President of the United States as the call audio continues.

notable_text: FOX NEWS ALERT; WASHINGTON; PRESIDENT TRUMP ON CORRESPONDENTS' DINNER SHOOTING; TRUMP: TOUGH TO SECURE CORRESPONDENTS' DINNER SITE; ON THE PHONE
